mapper.select: SELECT * FROM product WHERE status = 'ON_SALE' ORDER BY created_time DESC
SELECT * FROM product WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'ON_SALE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (title, description, price, category, condition_level, contact_wechat, image_url, status, created_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{price}, #{category}, #{conditionLevel}, #{contactWechat}, #{imageUrl}, #{status}, #{createdTime})
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM product WHERE status = 'ON_SALE'
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND category = #{category}
ORDER BY created_time DESC
